name: Number C32: Shark Drake LeVeiss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>３２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>咬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シャーク・ドレイク・リバイス
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Sanjūni Kaikōryū Shāku Doreiku Ribaisu
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 32: Sea Biting Dragon, Shark Drake LeVeiss
desc:
4 Level 5 monsters
You can also Xyz Summon this card by discarding 1 Spell, and using a Rank 4 "Shark Drake" Xyz Monster you control as material. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects, and if you do, its ATK/DEF become 0. This card can make a second attack during each Battle Phase, also if it attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

jp_sets.set: Rage of the Abyss +1 Bonus Pack

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
